title: Geomorphic Zonation Raster (Rasterized from Allen Coral Atlas)
abstract: Rasterized GeoTIFF derivative of the Allen Coral Atlas geomorphic zonation vector layer, produced internally for faster raster-based analysis (e.g. zonal statistics) than the source GeoPackage allows.

variables.name: class_code
variables.label: Geomorphic Class Code
variables.description: Rasterized geomorphic class code matching the Allen Coral Atlas geomorphic-map class scheme.

access.how_to_request: Internal derivative — contact the team for the rasterization method used.

provenance.license: Inherits Allen Coral Atlas data license

known_issues: Two near-duplicate output files present (geomorphic_output.tif and geomorphic_raster.tif); relationship between them (e.g. one an intermediate/reprocessed version of the other) not documented — needs verification with whoever produced them.
